name: owlnighter
description: Pull an owl-nighter — a Duolingo-style nightly reading-habit platform. Flutter app + Next.js admin + Fastify API over Supabase, grounded by Gemini and accelerated by Groq.
author: Alisher Farhadi

scripts.build: pnpm -r --filter "./packages/ts/**" run build && pnpm -r --filter "./apps/**" run build
scripts.db:up: docker run -d --name owlnighter-db -e POSTGRES_USER=postgres -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=postgres -e POSTGRES_DB=postgres -p 55432:5432 pgvector/pgvector:pg16
